entity_identify: Which option best identifies {entity_ref} in this ERP panorama?
What is the object referred to as {entity_ref}?
The region described as {entity_ref} is which object?
attribute_understanding: Which option best describes the {attribute_name} of {entity_ref}?
referring_grounding: Which candidate region matches the phrase: {entity_ref}?
Which option grounds the referring expression {entity_ref}?
existence: Does this ERP panorama contain any {category_name}?
Is there a {category_name} visible in the scene?
Can a {category_name} be found anywhere in this ERP image?
counting: How many {category_name} are visible in this ERP panorama?
Count the number of {category_name} in the full panorama.
What is the correct count of {category_name} in the scene?
scene_composition: Which statement best describes the scene composition of this ERP panorama?
Choose the most accurate summary of the overall scene layout.
Which option best matches the object arrangement in this scene?
absolute_direction: At what approximate direction is {entity_ref} located in the ERP panorama?
Which direction bin best matches the location of {entity_ref}?
Where is {entity_ref} in the full 360 panorama?
relative_direction: Relative to {entity_b}, where is {entity_a} in ERP angular space?
Which relation best describes the direction of {entity_a} relative to {entity_b}?
In the panorama, where is {entity_a} with respect to {entity_b}?
seam_continuity: Does {entity_ref} continue across the left-right ERP seam?
Is the seam-separated appearance of {entity_ref} still one continuous object?
Across the ERP boundary, does {entity_ref} remain the same instance?
rotation_consistency: If the ERP panorama is rotated {rotation_deg} degrees to the right, where would {entity_ref} appear?
After a {rotation_deg}-degree yaw rotation of the ERP image, what is the new direction of {entity_ref}?
How should the direction of {entity_ref} change after rotating the panorama by {rotation_deg} degrees?
polar_distortion_awareness: Is the stretched appearance of {entity_ref} mainly caused by ERP projection distortion?
Does {entity_ref} look elongated because it is near the ERP pole?
Is the apparent deformation of {entity_ref} a projection artifact?
depth_ordering: Which is closer to the observer, {entity_a} or {entity_b}?
Between {entity_a} and {entity_b}, which one is farther away?
Compare the depth ordering of {entity_a} and {entity_b}.
distance_bucket: How far is {entity_ref} from the observer?
relative_3d_position: What is the coarse 3D relation of {entity_a} relative to {entity_b}?
Is {entity_a} above, below, in front of, or behind {entity_b}?
Which option best describes the 3D relation between {entity_a} and {entity_b}?
object_search_initial_turn: To search for {entity_ref}, what is the best first turning action from the current heading?
Which initial turn best orients the observer toward {entity_ref}?
If the goal is {entity_ref}, what should the observer do first?
path_search_initial_action: Which initial navigation action is most plausible in this scene?
Given the visible geometry, what is the best first movement choice?
Which action best matches the immediately navigable direction?
